											<li class="post_author">

									<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 512 512"><path d="M406.5 399.6C387.4 352.9 341.5 320 288 320l-64 0c-53.5 0-99.4 32.9-118.5 79.6C69.9 362.2 48 311.7 48 256C48 141.1 141.1 48 256 48s208 93.1 208 208c0 55.7-21.9 106.2-57.5 143.6zm-40.1 32.7C334.4 452.4 296.6 464 256 464s-78.4-11.6-110.5-31.7c7.3-36.7 39.7-64.3 78.5-64.3l64 0c38.8 0 71.2 27.6 78.5 64.3zM256 512A256 256 0 1 0 256 0a256 256 0 1 0 0 512zm0-272a40 40 0 1 1 0-80 40 40 0 1 1 0 80zm-88-40a88 88 0 1 0 176 0 88 88 0 1 0 -176 0z"/></svg>

							<a href="https://basilicatawedding.it/sposarsi-in-basilicata-requisiti-e-normative/">
								<span class="cm-meta-icon">
									<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 448 512"><path d="M152 24c0-13.3-10.7-24-24-24s-24 10.7-24 24l0 40L64 64C28.7 64 0 92.7 0 128l0 16 0 48L0 448c0 35.3 28.7 64 64 64l320 0c35.3 0 64-28.7 64-64l0-256 0-48 0-16c0-35.3-28.7-64-64-64l-40 0 0-40c0-13.3-10.7-24-24-24s-24 10.7-24 24l0 40L152 64l0-40zM48 192l352 0 0 256c0 8.8-7.2 16-16 16L64 464c-8.8 0-16-7.2-16-16l0-256z"/></svg>
								</span>
								<time class="entry-date published" datetime="2023-08-30T06:50:53+00:00">Agosto 30, 2023</time>							</a>
						</li><!-- .posted_date -->
										</ul><!-- .post_meta -->
			</div><!-- .meta -->
																</div><!-- .post-holder -->
												</div><!-- .post_thumb -->
											</div><!-- .card -->
										</div><!-- .col.small_posts -->
																				<div class="col small_posts">
											<div class="card">
												<div class="post_thumb imghover" style="background-image: url(https://basilicatawedding.it/wp-content/uploads/2023/08/pexels-jonathan-borba-9703892.jpg);">
													<div class="post-holder">
																		<div class="entry_cats">
					<ul class="post-categories">
	<li><a href="https://basilicatawedding.it/category/news/" rel="category tag">News</a></li></ul>				</div><!-- .entry_cats -->
																		<div class="post_title">
															<h2><a href="https://basilicatawedding.it/location-matrimonio-in-basilicata/">Location Matrimonio in Basilicata: alternative alla classica sala ricevimenti</a></h2>
														</div><!-- .post_title -->
																	<div class="cm-post-meta">
				<ul class="post_meta">
											<li class="post_author">
							<a href="https://basilicatawedding.it/author/admin/">

<div class="cm-col-lg-6 cm-col-md-6 cm-col-12">
	<article id="post-8722" class="grid-post-holder post-8722 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail hentry category-uncategorized">
		<div class="card">
							<div class="post_thumb">
							<a href="https://basilicatawedding.it/matrimonio-in-una-tenuta-storica/">
			<figure class="imghover">
				<img width="674" height="450" src="https://basilicatawedding.it/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/le-damigelle-felici-sono-fotografate-vicino-alla-vecchia-casa-scaled.jpg" class="attachment-cream-magazine-thumbnail-2 size-cream-magazine-thumbnail-2 wp-post-image" alt="Matrimonio in una Tenuta Storica" decoding="async" loading="lazy" srcset="https://basilicatawedding.it/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/le-damigelle-felici-sono-fotografate-vicino-alla-vecchia-casa-scaled.jpg 2560w, https://basilicatawedding.it/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/le-damigelle-felici-sono-fotografate-vicino-alla-vecchia-casa-300x200.jpg 300w, https://basilicatawedding.it/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/le-damigelle-felici-sono-fotografate-vicino-alla-vecchia-casa-1024x684.jpg 1024w, https://basilicatawedding.it/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/le-damigelle-felici-sono-fotografate-vicino-alla-vecchia-casa-1536x1026.jpg 1536w, https://basilicatawedding.it/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/le-damigelle-felici-sono-fotografate-vicino-alla-vecchia-casa-2048x1368.jpg 2048w" sizes="(max-width: 674px) 100vw, 674px" />			</figure>
		</a>
						</div>
							<div class="card_content">
								<div class="entry_cats">
					<ul class="post-categories">
	<li><a href="https://basilicatawedding.it/category/uncategorized/" rel="category tag">Uncategorized</a></li></ul>				</div><!-- .entry_cats -->
								<div class="post_title">
					<h2><a href="https://basilicatawedding.it/matrimonio-in-una-tenuta-storica/">Matrimonio in una Tenuta Storica</a></h2>
				</div><!-- .post_title -->
							<div class="cm-post-meta">
				<ul class="post_meta">
											<li class="post_author">
							<a href="https://basilicatawedding.it/author/admin/">
								<span class="cm-meta-icon">
									<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 512 512"><path d="M406.5 399.6C387.4 352.9 341.5 320 288 320l-64 0c-53.5 0-99.4 32.9-118.5 79.6C69.9 362.2 48 311.7 48 256C48 141.1 141.1 48 256 48s208 93.1 208 208c0 55.7-21.9 106.2-57.5 143.6zm-40.1 32.7C334.4 452.4 296.6 464 256 464s-78.4-11.6-110.5-31.7c7.3-36.7 39.7-64.3 78.5-64.3l64 0c38.8 0 71.2 27.6 78.5 64.3zM256 512A256 256 0 1 0 256 0a256 256 0 1 0 0 512zm0-272a40 40 0 1 1 0-80 40 40 0 1 1 0 80zm-88-40a88 88 0 1 0 176 0 88 88 0 1 0 -176 0z"/></svg>
								</span>
								admin							</a>
						</li><!-- .post_author -->
												<li class="posted_date">

								<span class="cm-meta-icon">
									<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 448 512"><path d="M152 24c0-13.3-10.7-24-24-24s-24 10.7-24 24l0 40L64 64C28.7 64 0 92.7 0 128l0 16 0 48L0 448c0 35.3 28.7 64 64 64l320 0c35.3 0 64-28.7 64-64l0-256 0-48 0-16c0-35.3-28.7-64-64-64l-40 0 0-40c0-13.3-10.7-24-24-24s-24 10.7-24 24l0 40L152 64l0-40zM48 192l352 0 0 256c0 8.8-7.2 16-16 16L64 464c-8.8 0-16-7.2-16-16l0-256z"/></svg>
								</span>
								<time class="entry-date published" datetime="2024-01-23T20:08:30+00:00">Gennaio 23, 2024</time>							</a>

			</div><!-- .meta -->
			 
							</div><!-- .card_content -->
		</div><!-- .card -->
	</article><!-- #post-8722 -->
</div><!-- .col -->

	<article id="post-8705" class="grid-post-holder post-8705 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail hentry category-consigli">
